suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the pattern of using pinned commits from well-known public repos (e.g., octocat/Hello-World@7fd1a60b) for Docker integration tests as a best practice.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fresh-container-tests and install-reproducibility-tests use octocat/Hello-World with a specific commit hash for reproducible Docker tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the defensive pattern of checking docker_available() at test start and returning early if Docker is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All Docker integration tests in src/swe/docker_sandbox.rs follow this pattern consistently.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that --break-system-packages flag for pip installs is acceptable in Docker test containers but should not be used in production code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test_python_package_reproducibility uses pip install --break-system-packages for pragmatic testing.
